kpis.name: Assists
kpis.description: Number of assists adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Deep completions
kpis.description: Number of successful non-cross passes into the area within 20 meters of the opponent's goal adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Key passes
kpis.description: Number of passes that immediately create a clear goal-scoring opportunity for a teammate adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Second assists
kpis.description: Number of last actions of a player from a goalscoring team prior to an assist by a teammate adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: xA
kpis.description: Accumulated expected assists adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: xGCreated
kpis.description: Accumulated xG of shots within 5s of passes in the same possession assigned to the passer adjusted by possession.
